title: gymnadenia conopsea subsp. densiflora
intro: Gymnadenia conopsea subsp. densiflora, also known as the summer gentian, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the orchid family. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The plant's health benefits are said to include relief from digestive issues, reduction of fever, and alleviation of respiratory problems. In herbal preparations, Gymnadenia conopsea subsp. densiflora is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a variety of health conditions.
